name: x-dev-pipeline
description: Structured dev workflow with spec, requirements, planning, execution, code review, and fix loops.

interface.longDescription: Turn ad-hoc AI coding sessions into a traceable workflow with quick development, planning, review, and fix loops.
defaultPrompt: x-qdev add dark mode toggle to settings page
x-verify run dev-report command list against the latest task
x-qua-gate review the current task with R1/R2/R3 reviewers
x-fix fix issues from the latest verify or qa-gate report
